service.name: Spoonacular API
service.description_for_ai: Food and recipe API. 5000+ recipes, nutrition analysis, meal planning, grocery lists, ingredient substitutions, wine pairing. Search by diet (vegan, keto, gluten-free), ingredients, cuisine. 150 req/day free.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search recipes by query, diet, cuisine, ingredients. Returns recipes with nutrition info.

diet.description: vegetarian, vegan, gluten free, ketogenic, paleo, primal

cuisine.description: italian, mexican, chinese, indian, japanese, french

intolerances.description: dairy, egg, gluten, peanut, seafood, sesame

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get nutrition info for any food or recipe text. Returns calories, macros, vitamins.
